---
title: "Setting up schedule monitor"
format: html
---

Hello

```{r}
library(Bucephala)
```

Packages required by the original script (hoping the namespace route avoids the need to call all individually)
```{r}
#library(chromote)
#library(rvest)
#library(xml2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(tidyr)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(lubridate)
#library(stringr)
```

```{r}
#| eval: FALSE
FolderSetup()
```

```{r}
#| eval: FALSE
Active <- BrowserRun()
Active$view()
```
